fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Root guidance prompt files exist as generated rule-api outputs for /memory-setup, /interview, /user-training, /ticket-next, /next, /audit, and /tdd. 2. Agent files exist as generated rule-api outputs for testing, research, interview, and audit. 3. Rule-target configs and canonical rule entries are the source of truth for those files. 4. Focused tests cover the new target wiring and generation output shape. 5. Ticket status records validation specs/executions and references generated docs/logs using test-api, doc-api, and log-api concepts.
fields.title: [repo-guidance][rule-api] Generate workflow prompt and agent files from canonical rules
